ddls:
CREATE TABLE "h1b_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each H-1B visa application */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the application */,
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employer who submitted the application */,
  "initial_approval" INTEGER /* Number of initial approvals for the application */,
  "initial_denial" INTEGER /* Number of initial denials for the application */,
  "continuing_approval" INTEGER /* Number of continuing approvals for the application */,
  "continuing_denial" INTEGER /* Number of continuing denials for the application */,
  "naics_code" INTEGER /* NAICS code of the employer */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Tax ID of the employer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the employer is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title for which the visa is being applied */,
  "wage_offered" REAL /* Wage offered to the employee */,
  "work_location" TEXT /* Specific work location (e.g., address, city, state) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the application decision was made */,
  "application_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of application */,
  "application_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_h1b_applications_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_h1b_applications_naics_code FOREIGN KEY ("naics_code") REFERENCES naics_codes ("naics_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_h1b_applications_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_abbreviation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_h1b_applications_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_h1b_applications_tax_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_id") REFERENCES tax_ids ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_h1b_applications_application_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_type_id") REFERENCES application_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_h1b_applications_employer_id FOREIGN KEY ("employer_id") REFERENCES employers ("employer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_h1b_applications_application_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_status_id") REFERENCES application_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employers" (
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employer */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., LLC, Inc.) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the employer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the employer is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the employer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the employer operates in */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the company (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "naics_codes" (
  "naics_code" INTEGER /* NAICS code */,
  "naics_description" TEXT /* Description of the NAICS code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("naics_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_ids" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Tax ID of the employer */,
  "tax_id_status" TEXT /* Status of the tax ID (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax ID was registered */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the tax ID */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the company associated with the tax ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code */,
  "city_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the ZIP code is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_city_code FOREIGN KEY ("city_code") REFERENCES cities ("city_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., immigration officer, data analyst, policymaker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A secure hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the H-1B visa application being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the application data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the application data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES h1b_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_name" INTEGER /* Fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the application status (e.g., approved, denied) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the application type (e.g., initial, continuing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application detail */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the H-1B visa application */,
  "application_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of application */,
  "application_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the application decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_details_application_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_status_id") REFERENCES application_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_details_application_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_type_id") REFERENCES application_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_details_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES h1b_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application document */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the H-1B visa application */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., cover letter, resume) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_documents_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES h1b_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application note */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the H-1B visa application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_notes_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES h1b_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application history entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the H-1B visa application */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of the change (e.g., status, document) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_history_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES h1b_applications ("application_id")
)
